name: Snake-Eye Ash
name_jp: スネークアイ・エクセル
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Level 1 FIRE monster from your Deck to your hand. You can send 2 face-up cards you control to the GY, including this card; Special Summon 1 "Snake-Eye" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Snake-Eye Ash". You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eye Ash" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Level 1 FIRE monster from your Deck to your hand. You can send 2 face-up cards you control to the GY, including this card; Special Summon 1 "Snake-Eye" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Snake-Eye Ash". You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eye Ash" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Level 1 FIRE monster from your Deck to your hand. You can send 2 face-up cards you control to the GY, including this card; Special Summon 1 "Snake-Eye" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Snake-Eye Ash". You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eye Ash" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
